title: BetaDeck
description: Minecraft Modpack that aims to bring back old Beta experience to Steam Deck
body:
![BetaDeck ico](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/917085871222710303/1177569935979970560/icon.png?ex=6572fc76&is=65608776&hm=4d767090a7fe01b255f3e29ad4eb3a33274ed16b915c070d2f9e612b084da440&)

BetaDeck

**Ever wanted to play old versions of Minecraft on SteamDeck? Now you can do it without any configuration, etc. Just download this modpack and enjoy the game!** **This modpack changes the new version of Minecraft to resemble and function like the Beta version, but does not remove new things from the game**

Things that are changed:

- New generation mode - Old menu - Old inventory - Old textures - Old game icon - Old mechanics: - No hunger - Sheep shed wool when struck - Old world seeds work - Old beta lightning system - Old mob spawning And more! Download and check for yourself!

Things that are enabled by default:

- Sprinting - Swimming - New mobs - New blocks - Structures If you want, you can turn them off in the config

SteamDeck Features

- Gamepad support! - SteamGridDB images!

Known issues

Not yet ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

Things used

[Steam Deck Pixelart](https://www.reddit.com/r/Steam/comments/tvofg5/steam_deck_pixel_art_i_made_this_a_few_days_ago/ 'Reddit Post')
[GoldenDays Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/golden-days 'GoldenDays link')
